steps.title: Find the slope from the table
steps.content:
Using two table points, $(0,20)$ and $(1,21)$, the slope is
$$\frac{21-20}{1-0}=1$$

steps.title: Find the intercept
steps.content:
The table includes the point $(0,20)$, so the $y$-intercept is $20$. A line with slope $1$ and intercept $20$ has equation
$$y=x+20$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: The table points fit the line $y=x+20$. The answer is D.
